changelog: minimalist clock interface—significantly improved visual design. Note: weather entity ID must be configured in weather settings for conditions to display. Mod Store UI styling fixed. Extension system re-architected for more diverse future features. Thanks @Jarod73 for comprehensive ava-mods documentation, e.g., mimiclaw-ai-assistant. Thanks @pantherale0 for tutorial contribution—merged per #56, see qualcomm-audio-concurrency-fix for guides. Minor Bluetooth issues patched, legacy bugs resolved, font package size optimized.
